name: law firms processing 10-50 legal documents/month tool
description: For law firms processing 10-50 legal documents/month, inefficient document retrieval causes delays in case preparation. We convert legal documents into searchable digital archives instead of manual filing and searching through physical documents.

locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For law firms processing 10-50 legal documents/month, inefficient document retrieval causes delays in case preparation. We convert legal documents into searchable digital archives instead of manual filing and searching through physical documents.
locked_fields.current_alternative: manual filing and searching through physical documents
